title: Circular Process Loop v1
description: Input contract for circular-process-loop family. Accepts 'stages' for manifest matching (count_path) or 'nodes' directly. Internal converter maps entries to injector's 'nodes' param.

stages.description: Stage items for manifest matching. Each stage has a title and optional body.

nodes.description: Explicit nodes (alternative to 'stages'). Each node has a title and optional body.
